priorities.impact: Noindex directives can suppress ranking-critical pages.
priorities.title: Resolve indexability issue (SEO-001)

priorities.impact: Improves intent alignment, CTR, and topical coverage.
priorities.title: Run content refresh workflow for strategic pages

priorities.impact: Missing structured data can reduce eligibility for rich search enhancements.
priorities.title: Resolve structured-data issue (SEO-002)

priorities.impact: Improves local relevance for geo-intent queries.

remediation_steps.action: Remove unintended `noindex` directives from meta robots or X-Robots-Tag headers.
remediation_steps.impact: Noindex directives can suppress ranking-critical pages.
remediation_steps.title: Resolve indexability issue (SEO-001)
remediation_steps.verify_step: Inspect page source and response headers; confirm no `noindex` directive remains.

remediation_steps.action: Add JSON-LD schema matching page type and business entity details.
remediation_steps.impact: Missing structured data can reduce eligibility for rich search enhancements.
remediation_steps.title: Resolve structured-data issue (SEO-002)
remediation_steps.verify_step: Validate presence of application/ld+json scripts on affected pages.

remediation_steps.action: Use assets/templates/content-brief.md for each strategic URL and map one primary intent per page.
remediation_steps.impact: Improves intent alignment, CTR, and topical coverage.
remediation_steps.title: Run content refresh workflow for strategic pages
remediation_steps.verify_step: Complete content briefs and confirm title/H1/intent alignment on targeted pages.

remediation_steps.action: Use assets/templates/local-seo-audit.md to validate NAP consistency and LocalBusiness schema coverage.
remediation_steps.impact: Improves local relevance for geo-intent queries.
remediation_steps.title: Run local SEO audit for location pages
remediation_steps.verify_step: Complete local worksheet and resolve any NAP/schema discrepancies.

remediation_steps.action: Track opportunities in assets/templates/offpage-opportunities.csv and prioritize by topic fit and expected impact.
remediation_steps.impact: Improves authority signals for competitive topics.
remediation_steps.title: Build off-page authority opportunity backlog
remediation_steps.verify_step: Populate and review the off-page opportunities tracker.

verification_steps.command: Inspect page source and response headers; confirm no `noindex` directive remains.
verification_steps.title: Verify Resolve indexability issue (SEO-001)

verification_steps.command: Validate presence of application/ld+json scripts on affected pages.
verification_steps.title: Verify Resolve structured-data issue (SEO-002)

verification_steps.command: Complete content briefs and confirm title/H1/intent alignment on targeted pages.
verification_steps.title: Verify Run content refresh workflow for strategic pages

verification_steps.command: Complete local worksheet and resolve any NAP/schema discrepancies.
verification_steps.title: Verify Run local SEO audit for location pages

verification_steps.command: Populate and review the off-page opportunities tracker.
verification_steps.title: Verify Build off-page authority opportunity backlog
